name: agent-portal
description: Desktop-native operating environment for AI agents.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @magnexis/agent-portal && npm run build --workspace @magnexis/sdk && npm run build --workspace @magnexis/mcp-server && npm run build --workspace @magnexis/desktop && npm run build --workspace apps/vscode-extension
scripts.check: npm run build --workspace @magnexis/agent-portal && npm run typecheck --workspace @magnexis/agent-portal && npm run typecheck --workspace @magnexis/sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace @magnexis/mcp-server && npm run typecheck --workspace @magnexis/desktop && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/vscode-extension
scripts.test: python -m unittest discover -s python/tests -v && python -m unittest discover -s packages/agent-portal-mcp/tests -v && npm run build && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
